project.name: chioshotel-next / Voulamandis House
project.goal: Organize the large CSS, remove duplicate and obsolete CSS, then migrate gradually to Tailwind CSS without breaking the website.

current_status.git_status: clean before creating this documentation file

details: Verified split with: VERIFIED OK - concat(parts) == original body

commit.message: Split global CSS into organized imports

details: Removed duplicate FINAL MOBILE TYPOGRAPHY OVERRIDE block
Kept one valid typography override block
Removed old hero quiz animation override blocks
Removed old left-based and box-shadow animation attempts
Kept the newer transform-based performance block

commit.message: Remove old hero quiz animation overrides

details: Converted Beach Lovers CTA buttons from scoped CSS classes to Tailwind classes
Added reusable Tailwind button constants inside BeachLoversPage.tsx
Fixed final dark CTA text with !text-white because old cascade affected link color
Removed old beach-lovers button CSS rules after confirming no beach-lovers-btn classes remained in the component

commit.message: Migrate Beach Lovers buttons to Tailwind

safety: Work one small step at a time.
Run npm.cmd run build after every meaningful CSS change.
Run npm.cmd run dev and visually preview after build.
Commit after every safe completed step.
Do not edit many CSS sections together.
Do not start Tailwind migration from homepage, header, or footer.
css_order: Keep @import order identical to original CSS order unless there is a very specific reason.
Keep overrides.css near the end because it intentionally wins the cascade.
next_generated_files: next-env.d.ts may change automatically after build/dev.
Do not commit next-env.d.ts if it only changed because of Next generated route types.
If .next generated types break, remove .next and rebuild.

reason: Beach Lovers page is still isolated and safe
Buttons are done, so the next small target should be another contained visual section
Continue one small block at a time with build and preview
process: Choose the next small Beach Lovers section, likely hero note or section spacing
Convert only that section to Tailwind
Remove only the CSS that was replaced

do_not_do_next: Do not change import order without checking cascade impact.
Do not add many UI libraries together.
Do not commit next-env.d.ts if it changes automatically.

future_ui_direction.note: Use shadcn/ui carefully. Keep the warm premium Voulamandis House style and avoid making the site look like a generic template.

short_summary: CSS has been safely split, 339 obsolete or duplicate CSS lines were removed, Beach Lovers buttons were migrated to Tailwind, 48 more CSS lines were removed, the site builds and previews correctly, and the next safe step is continuing Beach Lovers Tailwind migration one small section at a time.
